ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* Unique FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "funding_allocation" REAL /* Annual funding allocated for lead exposure prevention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county FIPS code */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the subregion */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the subregion */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the subregion */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income level in the subregion */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in poverty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subregions_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion ID */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population count */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the age distribution */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the ethnicity distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_exposure" (
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead exposure record */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion ID */,
  "tested" INTEGER /* Number of individuals tested for lead exposure */,
  "percent_tested" REAL /* Percentage of the population tested */,
  "confirmed_over5" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases of lead exposure for ages 5 and under */,
  "percent_over5" REAL /* Percentage of the population 5 and under with confirmed lead exposure */,
  "confirmed_over10" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases of lead exposure for ages 10 and under */,
  "percent_over10" REAL /* Percentage of the population 10 and under with confirmed lead exposure */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the lead exposure data */,
  "total_confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed lead exposure cases */,
  "age_distribution_over5" TEXT /* JSON object representing the age distribution of confirmed cases over 5 years old */,
  "age_distribution_over10" TEXT /* JSON object representing the age distribution of confirmed cases over 10 years old */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the ethnicity distribution of confirmed cases */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention ID (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_exposure_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_exposure_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_exposure_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail record */,
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead exposure ID */,
  "children_bll_group_1" INTEGER /* Number of children with Blood Lead Level (BLL) between 5 and 9 */,
  "children_bll_group_2" INTEGER /* Number of children with BLL between 10 and 14 */,
  "children_bll_group_3" INTEGER /* Number of children with BLL between 15 and 19 */,
  "children_bll_group_4" INTEGER /* Number of children with BLL between 20 and 24 */,
  "children_bll_group_5" INTEGER /* Number of children with BLL of 25 or higher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_exposure_details_exposure_id FOREIGN KEY ("exposure_id") REFERENCES lead_exposure ("exposure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead exposure ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exposure_id FOREIGN KEY ("exposure_id") REFERENCES lead_exposure ("exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion ID */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "participating_organizations" TEXT /* JSON object listing organizations involved in the intervention */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* JSON object summarizing the impact assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead exposure ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, risk assessment) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* JSON object listing recommendations from the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_exposure_id FOREIGN KEY ("exposure_id") REFERENCES lead_exposure ("exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
